review_text: Well kept park , the people can't do enough for you. Great place 👌

We got lost and stumbled across this park hopefully we will get lost again  .booked for 1 night stayed for 4 .Vicky excellent host. Pet friendly plus. Everyone at the park were great. Rocky says woof woof woooof . One of  the cleanest parks we've come across.thanks everyone Kim and Mike

Stayed at this great park for 3 nights . The cabin was so clean and spacious and had everything you could need. The atmosphere was really chill and safe . The views across to the lake were amazing . Nicky was so helpful and friendly . Nothing was a bother .
We will definitely be back and recommend to others .

Great cabins and great staff.
Very polite and efficient.
Troy even gave us a lift to a venue and saved us an Uber. What a champion.
I should have taken my fishing rod.
Recommended

Lakeview Holiday Park was perfect for what we needed. Cabins are clean and spacious. Spa bath, air conditioned, big TV with all the services, big couch and comfy beds and cheap! Located across the road from the lake where we could fish and swim, less than 10 mins drive to beautiful beaches and the local restaurants and cafe’s had really good food. The best part was the service. Nikki and Troy were so nice. We booked last minute and they spent allot of their time explaining the area, setting us up in the cabins and were available to help the entire stay. Very friendly hosts.
I highly recommend staying here wether you’re backpacking (cheap) or a family holiday destination. 5 stars!

So freundliche Besitzer!!! Die Duschräume/WC sind nicht die neusten aber sehr sauber!
Blick auf den See. Zum Beach sinds mit dem Auto 5min.
Everything is very clean and tidy Nicky and Troy are so friendly and welcoming owners are friendly very close to shops and beaches and some beautiful lake views
Friendly staff great service great rates clean and tidy overall a great experience
Fantastic little caravan park. Great little cabins. Owners are lovely and service is fantastic and friendly.
The amenities are older but very clean.  The grounds are well maintained.  The caretakers are very friendly and obliging.|I would be happy to stay there again.

i have stayed at this caravan park recently and really appreciated how nice and welcoming the caretakers were. The bathrooms were clean and well-maintained, which made the stay comfortable. There are plenty of great places nearby to eat, giving lots of options for meals outside the park. The caravan park also has a great BBQ area, perfect for relaxing and cooking after a day out. Definitely a peaceful and convenient spot for a getaway!
Short overnight stay, staff where very friendly. I had to write a review as I was so amazed with the cleanliness and presentation of the amenities. Great little park.

Neat  & tidy  park with very welcoming caretakers .We stayed for 2 nights to attend a music festival .Nikky & Troy both very helpful & while we was at the festival had gone around & zipped up our tents for us because it had started to rain .so grateful our things didn’t get wet .The amenities are so very clean .We will definitely come back and stay.

We had a great stay here!
The couple who is  running the campsite is super nice and welcoming. They gave us some recommendations on where to go and even closed our tents when we forgot to close them and i started raining. Such legends.
We booked pretty spontaneously and it all worked out great!
Also we gotta mention that showers weren’t just clean, they also had great water pressure!

We booked here because our usual was booked out. The caravan sites are great but the main reason we will return is the managers are just wonderful. The sites are very tidy and the amenities though older are immaculate. A very welcoming caravan park.

Very friendly park opposite the lake. Very helpful management, nice cafe over the road by the entrance. Main drawback being on the road, but quiet enough at night. All services in towns, ie: restaurants, take away, supermarket etc.
Great spot, great shower, right by the lake! Market by the jetty was great too
Very nice place and very  worm and hospitality owners. They helped us with camper to  plug in all staff. Definitely recommend it 😀

Great little caravan park. Cabins are well kept, perfect size for family of 3-4. Amenities also maintained good. Perfect location, close to main shopping centre, some very nice local clubs for dinners and the management are a lovely couple who are very helpful.

We had a one night stay on our trip up the coast, and were treated like family. The price was fair for an off peak visit. This small caravan park was tidy and the amenities clean and bright. We have a large caravan and a drive through site was available to make it easy to set up. There is road noise if you are situated on that side of the park.

Great place, friendly/helpful owners. Rooms were clean and good value.

Great view of the lake from our room.

Highly recommend.

Lakeview Tourist Park is fantastic! The cabins are bright and spotlessly clean. The park is close to local beaches and shops and you can walk along the lake or sit outside and enjoy the view and serenity. The owners, Nikki and Troy are very helpful and extremely friendly, very nice people. I highly recommend a stay there it's beautiful and very relaxing.

We have stayed at this well kept Park in our caravan twice in the last few months. The amenities were kept spotlessly clean. Nicki, Troy & Frank are extremely friendly & very accommodating as we needed to extend both our stays. They went out of their way to make us feel welcome & they even attended to our belongings during a strong wind when we were not there. Their personal touches make this park very pleasant to stay in.

Had a great wkend stay
Close to everything
Very clean & new
Staff especially helpful & welcoming
Will definitely book again

Felt like I'd come home!!
Thank you

Lovely, smaller park. It has a family & community feel, mainly permanent vans & cabins but still plenty of room for travellers. Great location on tuggerah Lake & central to everything. Although conveniently located off the main road, it's surprisingly quiet.
Definitely the cleanest bathrooms I've seen in any camper park. They were so clean that you could sleep in them. The management were so helpful .
Very noisy road and definitely no lake view at the front near the office. Might be better with an actual Lakeview site right at the back. Friendly host, very good clean amenities

Thank you Frank, it was great to meet you and accomodate my family at this busy weekend with the Festival. We had a lovely stay in our caravan, Frank offered to help us from the moment we arrived. The ammenities were clean and easily accessible. The only thing we wished was to stay longer.
Great little tourist park. Ideal for a weekend getaway and close to everything you'll need.
Top park and great location. The amenities are clean and the showers are hot. Lovely friendly people where nothing is ever a problem. Will absolutely be back. Thankyou all 😊

My mum and I can't thank Frank and Paul enough ,we have a great spot, Paul parked our van for us ,he was so helpful, we were only going to stay one night , they made us feel so welcome we're staying longer , toilets and showers are very clean , nice ,quiet and relaxing place to stay, good old fashioned service were nothings a problem and that's hard to find these days, many thanks Paul and Frank 😀
Was great service was great clean amenities.  Cabin was very clean.

The owners were nice, and the camping ammenities were fine but we had a number of items stolen. Lock up everything if you are staying. I had chairs, a rooftop tent ladder, two pairs of shoes and a decanter pinched.
Frank & Paul, a great PR for the park! Drove straight in at about 7pm..awesome place guys!!
Awesome 👌

We stopped for one night with our caravan. For the price  the park is pretty good. But I don't think we will be back there. This wired guy was watchig as while we were unpacking and later in the evening while we were having dinner inside, our caravan step was stolen from the front of our caravan??

A great place to park. Frank found us a spot and made sure we had no issues with the rain. Excellent facilities, always clean bathroom with hot showers, BBQ, just steps from the lake, and a shopping center very close by.
Highly recommended.

I stopped at this caravan park for a night on my travels from QLD to Melbourne. I was arriving late and the Manager advised that a care taker would be waiting for me. Once I arrived I called the Manager Frank and he called the care taker Paul straight away. Paul came straight out and finalised my booking. He then took me to my site which I hadn’t experienced at any other caravan park. He was extremely helpful and very friendly. My site was in a perfect spot down the back of the park and a beautiful lake was just across the road which was so nice to wake up to. The park was a smaller park and so peaceful at night.
I would like to thank Frank and Paul for their amazing customer service.

Took a spontaneous drive to the coast and couldn’t find accomodation last minute .Thought I’d try my luck by calling Lakeview  holiday park as I enjoy cabin weekenders .The guy at reception was very friendly , ,letting me know he has only one cabin left It was quite reasonable in price seeing everywhere else was booked completely.
The cabin was excellent .Just what I needed with a water front view, clean,all amenities needed,full kitchen ,spa and a big deck to have breakfast on . Made my overnight stay a A++Thankyou 😄I will be back .Tess

Great little park. It was more expensive than we thought looking at the website but it was very tidy and secure. The amenities were dated but clean and well maintained. Very helpful manager and caretaker. Lovely views of the lake.

Nice affordable caravan park. Clean and tidy grounds and amenities. Close to beaches with lakeside views. Short distance to shops and take away. Friendly staff. An enjoyable stay and highly recommended.
This place is quite expensive for $50 a night as its just a place to put your caravan & thats it, it has no pool & very close to a main road which is very noisy
Reasonable caravan park. Crazy old permanent resident flashing a spotlight at us at 2am because we had been given a spot that blocked his view.

It’s was really disappointing what show on website and actually what they have for example showing water front camping site but right on the road  you are unable to access anything on the website had to ring up and ask regarding the facilities camping spot was too small everyone look like siting each other lake was next to us but smelling like a sewerage

We found ourselves stranded with towing issues far from home and despite being full Lake view tourist park after a brief conservation they went out of their way to make room for us and our van, they were polite helpful and extremely friendly, and last but not least the park is well set out very tidy and well located!, Definitely worth a visit!, 😊👍

Well after reading all the negative reviews,I have to say that our stay in a lux lakeview cabin was really nice...Only negs I could think of was the one and only coat hanger...??...And possibly the AC filter could be cleaned...Otherwise what I have noticed in every place we have stayed in is...The sharp knives are always blunt...Knowing this,I always bring my own really sharp knives...Otherwise the pos's...The cabin was really clean and newish,the beds were comfy...To be eco friendly,I would suggest they put in paper and plastics recycle bins...Otherwise,very enjoyable...!!|
Frank helped me when i had to rush home for a funeral and had a bad experience with a hotel previous night. He went beyond what he had to do. Thank you very much frank.

The park is a little loud as you are on the side of a busy road. However so close to the lake and local cafes.
The SHOWERS are to die for!!!! Absolutely stunning

While my stay got off to a rough start, Frank was exceptional with rectifying the issues I raised and went above and beyond. I was very impressed with his customer service. I stayed in the more luxury water view cabin in the end and would do so again but I would not recommend the cheaper cabins.
